content:
IN THE COURT OF THE SESSIONS JUDGE, CHANDIGARH

STATE OF PUNJAB vs. ROHAN VERMA

Case No.: 003/2024

Charge Sheet under Sections 380, 457, and 446 of the Indian Penal Code, 1860.

The accused, Rohan Verma, aged 26, son of Baldev Singh, resident of Room 3B, Shivam Guest House, Kharar, is charged with:

1. Theft under Section 380 IPC — for stealing a Rolex watch, ₹2.5 lakh in cash, and a silver tea set.
2. House-breaking by night under Section 457 IPC — for entering the dwelling house of Arjun Mehta through an unlocked window at night with intent to commit theft.
3. Mischief by damaging property under Section 446 IPC — for damaging the wooden drawer to gain access.

Evidence:
- Fingerprint match on drawer (forensic report FR-2024-0315-0876)
- Recovery of stolen property from accused’s residence (recovery report RR-2024-0318-0876)
- CCTV footage showing suspect entering/exiting compound (CCTV-2024-0315-0876)
- Employment history and motive of revenge (witness statements)

The accused denies the charges. The prosecution submits that the evidence is conclusive and the inconsistencies in witness testimony do not undermine the physical evidence.

The charge sheet is submitted for trial.

Dated: 22.03.2024

(Signature)
Public Prosecutor
Chandigarh
